blocks.content: November. Daisy's MySpace profile had a new song.
Kit noticed because he checked it occasionally. The song was different from last month's. He didn't know it.
It was a love song. The slow kind, about wanting to say something and not knowing how. He listened to thirty seconds of it and closed the browser.
That night in the group chat, Eli was being Eli.
ok who noticed daisy changed her myspace song
He closed the laptop. Opened it again. Looked at the buddy list. Daisy's icon showed active. He did not open a window.
